module simd_address.0.wasm

assert_return load_data_4 i32:0 -> v128:02030405060708091011121314150000
assert_return load_data_5 i32:0 -> v128:15000000000000000000000000000000
assert_return load_data_1 i32:65505 -> v128:16171819202122232425262728293031

assert_return store_data_0 () -> v128:000000000000803f0000004000004040
